title: Traveling with Kyle - Living in Chile Part 13/17

transcript.text: And then the engine just smokes and it blows up and so we just decided to just
Push it off to the side of the road and where where it blew up was in a perfect
Place right there next to where there's we walked down a little bit and there's
This little river tiny little river that was coming down but we were way up in
The mountains like above Timberline um we found this nice flat little area and the
Next day we ate acid like gel acid that I brought back from America it was her
First time tripping it was really fun like we were all we ate it and then like
Half hour later while just kind of hanging out there and then all of a
Sudden like 50 or 100 goats just like walk right through our camp and she
Starts going and I was like oh bad and then that's when we realized we were
Tripping and so the goats like walk by and we're like talking to them and
They're eating the water out of the river and they hang out for like you know and
Walk off and and then there but there was when then we started making this like
Little like river try to make a pool of river but we kept like try to make a wall
But the more you make the wall that like push the water aside or something it was

Fanned down and was passing through this big wide grass really green grassy area
Which was next to where we were camping out but we found a dry patch but it's

Because it'd been get baked getting baked from the Sun when it coagulated in this

We laid in there for like a few hours it was pretty cool and I brought a it was

That was a long ways away and you could see this like the the you know the heat

It would have been amazing mountain to climb I didn't do any mountain climbing or
Anything while I was there because my I just never had a car and so but so I
Just you know did the mountain biking with my buddy so then we coasted the car
Down after a trip we stayed there like two nights or we stayed there one night
I don't know we stayed there two nights I think and then we coasted the car down to
Like the first town and then took the bus back and she had I guess we had her
Uncle come out and get the car and he tried to tell me I was driving a car too

Actually look closer at the car and notice that there was no water he never

To him I took it to a local mechanic and the local mechanic fixed it and we just

Wasn't she didn't want to sell it she wanted to have a car but I was just fed

The first time and then I go to America two months and I was there for two years um so the
